changeSet.author: Daniel A. Kolesnik
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE users_agreements DROP CONSTRAINT fk_users_agreements_to_organizations_agreements, ADD CONSTRAINT fk_users_agreements_to_organizations_agreements FOREIGN KEY (organization_agreement_id) REFERENCES organizations_agreements (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE users_agreements DROP CONSTRAINT fk_users_agreements_to_users, ADD CONSTRAINT fk_users_agreements_to_users FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE;
